text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 76 

DPRTMNTL_TOT_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Total charge for all ancillary departments related to beneficiary’s stay ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The total charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for all ancillary departments (other than routine 
room and board, CCU, and ICU) related to a beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: DPRTMNTL 

LONG NAME: DPRTMNTL_TOT_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived)
